title: VelvetTab
description: Smooth animation of opening and closing the player list
body:
# VelvetTab

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/VelvetTab?color=00AF5C&label=Modrinth&style=flat&logo=modrinth)][modrinth-page]
![Environment: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat-square)
[![Mod loader: Fabric]][fabric]

Smooth, configurable animation for the TAB player list.


## ❓ What is this?

**VelvetTab** is a lightweight client-side mod for [Fabric][fabric] that adds a smooth open/close animation to the TAB player list and lets you fine-tune its look and feel.



## ✨ Features

- **Animated TAB**
  - enable/disable animation
  - adjustable duration
  - X/Y offsets (`offsetY = -1` centers vertically)

- **Appearance**
  - panel background (toggle + ARGB color)
  - row background (toggle + ARGB color)
  - outer border (toggle + ARGB color)
  - separate backgrounds for **Header** and **Footer**

- **Text shadows (per section)**
  - header text shadow
  - footer text shadow
  - player list text shadow (names / numeric ping)

- **Player heads**
  - toggle heads
  - optional “better hat” overlay (slightly thicker 2nd skin layer)

- **Ping display modes**
  - **Vanilla** — standard icon bars
  - **Numeric** — latency in ms with **custom colors per threshold**  
    (<75, <145, <200, <300, <400, ≥400)
  - **Off** — hide ping

- **Configuration UX**
  - Cloth Config settings screen
  - live preview while editing
  - presets: export/import (Base64) + quick **Reset**

- **Client-only**
  - no server installation required


## 🖥️ How does it work?

The mod uses mixins to adjust the animation and rendering of the player list while keeping the vanilla behavior where appropriate.


## 📦 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader][fabric].
2. (Recommended) Install **Cloth Config** and **Mod Menu**.
3. Download the latest VelvetTab from the [Modrinth Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/velvettab/versions) page.
4. Drop the `.jar` into your `mods` folder.
5. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile.

> VelvetTab is **client-side only**.


## 📖 Usage

Press **TAB** as usual — the animation and visual tweaks apply automatically. Adjust everything in the settings screen; changes are previewed live.
